_doc: Data-driven league registry. A league INHERITS its config from its `extends` chain (league -> intermediate profile -> family). Nearest definition wins; objects shallow-merge, scalars replace. The worker resolves the chain at load and uses it to interpret raw ESPN period integers, pick the right normalizer, and humanize labels. Adding a league = a data entry, not code. All `espnLeagueId` values are STRINGS sourced from live JSON; `verifiedIds:false` marks ids/structures the adversarial pass could NOT confirm against the live API (treat as best-effort, re-fetch before trusting).
standings: https://site.api.espn.com/apis/v2/sports/{espnPath}/standings?season={year}  (USE apis/v2, NOT apis/site/v2 — the latter returns a fullViewLink stub)

notes: clock counts up, stoppage shown as 45'+x / 90'+x
no per-half linescores array; derive halves from details[]

football.overtimeDetect: period>4 OR linescores.length>4 OR altDetail contains 'OT'. QUIRK: STATUS_FINAL_OVERTIME does NOT exist — OT games are STATUS_FINAL(id3) with detail 'Final/OT' and altDetail 'OT'. Detail suffix is unreliable (7OT showed plain 'Final').

basketball.overtime: uniform 5-min (format.overtime.clock=300s), unlimited until a winner; each OT appends one linescores element. Detect via period>regulation.
basketball.overtimeDetect: status.period > regulationPeriods OR shortDetail contains 'OT' (altDetail '2OT' also present)
notes: period LENGTH is the key per-league delta; use format.regulation.clock (NBA 720s, WNBA/NCAAW 600s, NCAAM 1200s/half)

baseball.extraScoreFields: competitor.hits and competitor.errors complete the R/H/E line; period = inning number
baseball.liveLabel: inning half is in status.detail ('Top 5th'/'Bottom 7th'/'Mid 3rd'/'End 6th') + situation.isTopInning, NOT in status.period
notes: a 'Final' with fewer than regulation innings is a legitimate called/mercy game, not an error

hockey.shootout: NHL reg season ONLY: period 5, detail 'Final/SO', altDetail 'SO'; the SO decider (+1) is folded into competitor.score. College has NO shootout period.
hockey.overtimeDetect: period>3. QUIRK: period 5 = SHOOTOUT for NHL reg season, but = 2OT for NHL playoffs / NCAA tournament — disambiguate by league + seasonType.
notes: NHL summary has NO header key — read status from scoreboard, not summary

tennis.bestOf: DO NOT trust format.regulation.periods (VERIFIED unreliable: returns 5 for non-major qualifying & doubles). Derive: men's singles at a Slam (events.major && mens-singles) = best-of-5; everything else = best-of-3. Validate against actual linescores length.
tennis.tiebreak: periodScores[].tiebreak is present on BOTH competitors = each side's TB points. Reconstruct '7-6(3)' from the loser's value. Can exceed 10 (11-9 super-TBs); never key off ==10.
tennis.standings: none — tour RANKINGS list, not a table; within a tournament advancement is a single-elim bracket

golf.progress: competitor.status.thru (holes done) + status.period (round). Score is to-par string ('-10'/'E'/'+3'); numeric strokes only via core API.
golf.playoffDetect: competition.status.hadPlayoff === true (the reliable signal) AND/OR competitor.status.playoff AND/OR a linescore period>numberOfRounds. QUIRK: tournament.playoffType is HALLUCINATED — does not exist.
golf.nonFinishers: STATUS_CUT(id3) is OVERLOADED — Missed Cut / Withdrawn(WD) / Disqualified(DQ) all share it; disambiguate via status.description/shortDetail. Sorted to bottom by order.
golf.scoringSystem: 'Medal' (stroke play) vs 'Teamstroke' (two-player team events, e.g. Dow Championship)
notes: cut presence varies BY EVENT not league — read tournament.cutRound (0 = no cut)
ignore trailing sentinel linescore periods (e.g. 402) with only {period}

racing.result: no score field. Finish = competitor.order; grid = competitor.startOrder; period = laps completed by leader. championship pts + lap stats in core statistics.
racing.dnf: DNF/unclassified = competitor has NO `order` (and a SPARSE statistics set — keys like lapsCompleted/place are ABSENT, not zero). Never test lapsCompleted==0; key off absence of order. Vehicle object still present.
racing.multiCompetition: F1 event = MANY competitions (FP1/FP2/FP3 share type.id=1, differ by abbreviation; Qualifying; Race; Sprint weekends add 2 more). NASCAR/IndyCar = ONE competition (id==eventId). Filter F1 to type.abbreviation=='Race' for the race.
racing.liveFlag: competition.status.flag (GREEN/YELLOW/RED/CHECKER) is F1-ONLY; absent for NASCAR/IndyCar.

mma.card: event = a fight CARD; each competition = one bout (red/blue corner via order). Per-bout format.regulation.periods is 3 (regular) or 5 (title/main) — READ PER BOUT.
mma.method: Outcome = winner boolean + method. QUIRK: method (KO/TKO, Submission, Decision) is NOT in the site scoreboard status — only via core API status $ref / details[].type.text. Decision finishTime is the round length ('5:00'), not a stoppage.
mma.siteVsCore: site scoreboard may DROP a scratched bout (UFC 324: site 10 vs core 11 competitions) — site count is authoritative for display; never align by core matchNumber.
mma.format: site scoreboard format.regulation = {periods} ONLY; round length (clock) is core API only.
mma.boxingUnsupported: ESPN has NO boxing sport. Only sparse 'boxe'/'k1' league slugs under mma. Source boxing elsewhere.

cricket.format: READ PER MATCH from competitions[].class.generalClassCard — present broadly (NOT internationals-only): 'Twenty20'(IPL,20ov/2inn), 'Women T20', 'ODI'(50ov/2inn), 'T20I', 'First-class'/'Test'(up to 4 innings, multi-day). class.eventType is the coarse bucket (T20/ODI/Test). A single tour id can contain matches of DIFFERENT formats.
cricket.score: competitor.score is a COMPOSITE STRING ('161/5 (18/20 ov, target 156)'); authoritative numbers in periodScores[].cricket {runs,wickets,overs,isBatting,target,reason}. reason ∈ {'all out','target reached','complete','No result'}.
cricket.result: status.summary carries the result ('RCB won by 5 wkts (12b rem)' / 'AUS Women won by 65 runs' / 'Match drawn' / 'No result'). Winner via summary, not run totals.
edgeCases: suspended(multi-day 'Stumps Day N', state stays 'in' across days)
notes: bilateral tours get a NEW ephemeral numeric league id per series
URL slug != leagues[0].id — read the real id from JSON

rugby.lineScoresCumulative: QUIRK: rugby linescores[].value is a CUMULATIVE running total — period 2 ALWAYS == final score; period 1 == score at half time (may be 0 if not backfilled). NEVER sum period1+period2. ESPN also emits placeholder periods 20 & 60 (always 0) — ignored via ignorePeriods.
rugby.overtime: knockouts: 2x10 extra time then sudden-death + kicking competition; pool/league draws allowed
rugby.standings: stats gamesWon/Lost/Drawn, points, pointsFor/Against, bonusPoints, pointsDifference

rugby-league.overtime: golden point: 2x5 extra time, first score wins (reg season may still draw)
rugby-league.statusFinalDetail: QUIRK: rugby-league Final detail is 'Final' (NOT union's 'FT') — terminal detection keying on 'FT' misses every NRL game
notes: separate ESPN sport path 'rugby-league'; requires a league id segment (e.g. /3/) — bare path 404s

soccer.domestic.overtime: none — a draw is a final result (STATUS_FULL_TIME, 'FT')

soccer.knockout.overtime: 2x15 extra time (period 4, AET, STATUS_FINAL_AET id45) then penalty shootout (period 5, FT-Pens, STATUS_FINAL_PEN id47)
soccer.knockout.decisionFields: shootoutScore (number, winner set from it); aggregateScore (STRING) + advance(bool) for TWO-LEG ties (UEFA only)
soccer.knockout.standings: groups (children[] per group) and/or knockout bracket

soccer/usa.1.name: Major League Soccer
soccer/usa.1._note: reg season draws stand; playoff shootout format UNVERIFIED against live data

soccer/uefa.champions.name: UEFA Champions League
soccer/uefa.champions._note: new 36-team league phase + knockout; two-leg ties carry aggregateScore(STRING)+advance

soccer/fifa.world.name: FIFA World Cup
soccer/fifa.world._note: 2026 standings returned 8 groups A-H (enumerate children[] at runtime; do not hardcode group count); group stage draws stand, knockout adds AET+pens

soccer/_other.name: Other domestic top divisions (ned.1, sco.1, por.1, etc.)
soccer/_other._note: all share soccer.domestic; read id from JSON. Cups (eng.fa, copa_del_rey) extend soccer.knockout

football/nfl.name: NFL
football/nfl.overtime: one 10-min(reg)/15-min(playoff) modified sudden-death (period 5); reg season can TIE

football/college-football.name: NCAA Football (FBS)
football/college-football.overtime: untimed alternating-possession from 25; 2pt-only from 3OT; never ties; period 5,6,7...
football/college-football._note: leagues[].groups is an OBJECT {id,name,shortName,isConference} when ?groups= passed; /rankings endpoint for AP/Coaches/CFP

football/ufl.name: United Football League
football/ufl.overtime: alternating single 2pt conversion, best-of-3 rounds then sudden death

football/cfl.name: Canadian Football League
football/cfl.overtime: alternating possession from 35; reg season caps at 2 → can tie
football/cfl._note: 3-DOWN football, 110-yd field: situation.down maxes at 3, same field names. WARNING: ?dates= unreliable for CFL (returns stale 2023 calendar); live capture needs core.api path

basketball/mens-college-basketball.name: NCAA Men's Basketball
basketball/mens-college-basketball._note: THE delta: only basketball league in HALVES (verified format.regulation.periods=2, clock=1200s); OT periods 3+; player box score lacks +/- (13 cols vs NBA 14)

basketball/womens-college-basketball.name: NCAA Women's Basketball
basketball/womens-college-basketball._note: VERIFIED quarters since 2015-16 (matches WNBA, NOT NCAAM) — the most error-prone assumption, confirmed against 2025 title game

basketball/nbl.name: National Basketball League
basketball/nbl._note: Australian/NZ NBL (uid s:40~l:55; includes NZ Breakers). THE delta vs basketball family default 12-min: 10-min quarters (format.regulation.clock=600s) — same as WNBA/NCAAW. Quarters VERIFIED (format.regulation.slug='quarter', 4 linescores per final). 5-min OT clock VERIFIED (format.overtime.clock=300s); unlimited/one-linescore-per-OT inherited from family, NOT directly observed (no OT game in sampled finals). No curatedRank (ranking=none). UNPROBED: playoff/Grand Final shapes (season.type=3, possible best-of series) and standings ladder — inherit family defaults until a finals game is captured.

baseball/mlb.name: Major League Baseball
baseball/mlb._note: id is 10 NOT 1 (1 is the sport segment s:1); Manfred runner on 2B in extras not a field; doubleheaders = 2 events same date

baseball/college-baseball.name: NCAA Baseball
baseball/college-baseball._note: scheduled doubleheaders may be 7 innings — a 'complete' game can legitimately have 7 linescores; season.type can be 6 (championship-series, CWS)

baseball/college-softball.name: NCAA Softball
baseball/college-softball._note: CRITICAL path is baseball/college-softball (no top-level softball sport). 7-inning regulation (format.regulation.periods=7) is the key delta; International Tiebreaker runner on 2B; 8-runs-after-5 mercy

hockey/nhl.name: NHL
hockey/nhl.standings: Eastern/Western conference children[]; order by points, RW, ROW, H2H, GD
hockey/nhl._note: reg season: 5-min 3-on-3 OT(period4) then shootout(period5,'Final/SO'); playoffs: unlimited 20-min OT, no SO. plays type ids NOT verified — do not assert 506-509

hockey/mens-college-hockey.name: NCAA Men's Ice Hockey
hockey/mens-college-hockey._note: ties possible; boxscore/plays often EMPTY for college; tournament uses 20-min OT, no shootout period

hockey/womens-college-hockey.name: NCAA Women's Hockey
hockey/womens-college-hockey._note: ties common (e.g. 35-1-0); sparse coverage — many in-season dates return events:[]

tennis/atp.name: ATP Tour
tennis/atp._note: id is 851 NOT 850 (850 = tennis SPORT id, shared s:850). Men's singles best-of-5 at Slams only

tennis/wta.name: WTA Tour
tennis/wta._note: all singles best-of-3 incl Slams. Combined events appear under BOTH atp & wta endpoints

golf/pga.name: PGA Tour
golf/pga._note: 72-hole/4 rounds, cut after R2 (cutRound=2); signature/no-cut events cutRound=0

golf/champions-tour.name: PGA Tour Champions
golf/champions-tour._note: 54-hole/3 rounds (numberOfRounds=3) and NO cut (cutRound=0) — the key golf delta

racing/f1.name: Formula 1
racing/f1._note: MULTI-competition event (FP1/FP2/FP3/Qual/Race; sprint weekends +2). Only league with working per-competitor status endpoint + competition.status.flag; /teams returns the constructors (hasTeams)

racing/nascar-premier.name: NASCAR Cup Series
racing/nascar-premier._note: slug MUST be nascar-premier (racing/nascar 400s). Single competition (id==eventId). Richest vehicle + stats. GWC overtime = more laps, not an OT structure

racing/irl.name: IndyCar
racing/irl._note: single competition; DNF = no order + sparse stats

mma/ufc.name: UFC
mma/ufc._note: richest combat data; method via core API only

cricket/8052.name: County Championship Div 1
cricket/8052._note: First-class (generalClassCard='First-class'), up to 4 innings, draws common

cricket/_tours.name: International bilateral tours (ODI/T20I/Test)
cricket/_tours._note: ephemeral per-series ids; READ format PER MATCH from class.generalClassCard, never per-league

rugby-league/3.name: NRL (National Rugby League)
rugby-league/3._note: path rugby-league/3/scoreboard works (bare path 404s); Final detail is 'Final' not 'FT'
